merged_prs.title: Update MPI Test software
`convertToRaw`: Handle missing `CMSSW_FULL_RELEASE_BASE` environment variable
`compareMemoryProfiles`: support just one file in input
[L1T] Adding a reduced data format: phase2_l1scout for use in the Spring24 MC Campaign (Phase 2)
Phase2-hgx367L1 Correct a bug in HGCalGeomParameters.cc to make it work correctly for the ColdBox mode of HGCal
Extend convertToRaw to support streamer files
Remove delayed call to EventSetupsController::finishConfiguration
Phase2-hgx367M1 Correct the testing code for finding neghbours of HGCal silicon cells
Re-enable unit tests for TkAl offline validation tools for Phase-2
Reclycing GEN-SIM Only for the Default Run4 Geometry
ME0 integration in PFMuon algorithm
Fix edmMpiConfigSplitter logic when grouping with dublicated modules
Fix incorrect loop and memory leak in Phase 2 SIM code
Corrected template parameters for Alpaka PF MD Clusterizer Epilogue kernels

merged_prs.title: Update GenProton NanoAOD acceptance for Run 3
add a unit test for `hltDiff`
re-organization of HGCal local reconstruction HLT products, add unseeded EGamma GSF tracks to FEVTHLT
DQM/Physics: clang warning fixes for unused variables
Fix tree ownership issue in NanoAODTools
add a test for coverage of configuration validation of plugins used at HLT

el9_aarch64_gcc13.title: Python packages update to get security fixes
enable multi-vectorization for ucx version 1.20.1
Update dasgoclient version to v02.04.53

[ROOT6] Updated root to tip of branch master

[ROOT639] Updated root to tip of branch master

Split torch tool for cpu, cuda and rocm
Use JAVA21 on el10 IBs
[PY312] Upgrade mplhep to version 1.1.0
Update pacparser to version 1.5.0
[PY312] Update ninja version to 1.13.1
Improved pypi packages build; massive update of pypi packages

[PY312][Eigen] Disable eigen debug for CUDA compilers

Add missing file flatbuffers-7422.patch

[TF] patched tensorflow protobuf with non-virtual destructor
[TF] Update Tensorflow to 2.17.0 build with c++20 standard
[TF] fixes zlib headers
[Python 3.12]  Fixes for slc7
[PY312] Update various base level tools e.g zlib, xz, cmake and more
[py312][xrootd] disable python binding for slc7 due to openssl version 1.0.2
[PY312] Fix for fix for TF 2.16
Set default keras backend at runtime
Fix TensorFlow for AArch64

Fix bazel recipe
